fields.name: regions
fields.label: Regions
fields.description: Comma-separated AWS region names to scan. Leave empty to use the connector default.

fields.name: services
fields.label: Services
fields.description: Limit collection to a subset of AWS services.

fields.name: profile
fields.label: AWS Profile
fields.description: Override the configured AWS profile for this collection run.

output.label: Output Mode
output.description: Choose how AWS collection results should be emitted: summary text, JSON, or no stdout output.

refresh.label: Refresh cached findings
refresh.description: Ignore cached findings and query AWS again.
